recommendations.overview: An irritable marketing executive, Neal Page, is heading home to Chicago for Thanksgiving when a number of delays force him to travel with a well meaning but overbearing shower curtain ring salesman, Del Griffith.

recommendations.title: Uncle Buck

recommendations.title: Sixteen Candles

recommendations.title: The Good Night

recommendations.title: I Feel Pretty
recommendations.overview: A head injury causes a woman to develop an extraordinary amount of confidence and believe she's drop dead gorgeous.

recommendations.title: Little Evil
recommendations.overview: Gary, who has just married Samantha, the woman of his dreams, discovers that her six-year-old son may be the Antichrist.
